cad_masters.notes: Existing parametric master (kept, not rewritten, per V5 idiophones addendum); bar length/node-hole layout for review and CAM mockups, not final tuning.
Current dimensional authority (K constant, bar schedule, node positions); requires pilot K calibration before full cutting.

notes: OpenSCAD starter + design table are the current masters; no native SolidWorks or STEP export yet (cad/SolidWorks-MasterLayout-Plan.md is a contract, not native CAD). Gate A (Alpha workspace compile) not yet run.
